text:
Chronic Condition Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: Medicare Part D Pharmacy Characteristics │ April 2021 │ V 1.1 
1 
Variable Details 
This section of the codebook contains one entry for each variable in the Medicare Part D Prescriber Characteristics file. 
Each entry contains variable details to facilitate understanding and use of the variables. 
CCW_PRESCRIBER_ID 
LABEL: 
CCW-assigned Prescriber Identifier 
DESCRIPTION: This variable is the CCW-assigned number that is used to uniquely identify
